Day-1 Probe Status: SKIPPED — wolframscript not found
Date: 2026-04-19
Machine: darwin (macOS)

wolframscript was not available on the build machine.
The provisional SARAH name canonicalizer from W0 is in use:
    dark_su3 -> DarkSU3   (provisional rule: split on _, capitalize each segment)

TODO: When wolframscript and SARAH are available, run:
    wolframscript -code 'AppendTo[$Path, "<sarah_path>/.."]; <<SARAH`; Start["SM"]; Print[ModelName]'

Then test the dark_su3 model name:
    1. Copy the rendered DarkSU3.m file to SARAH's Models/ directory
    2. Run: wolframscript -code 'AppendTo[$Path, "<sarah_path>/.."]; <<SARAH`; Start["DarkSU3"]; Print[ModelName]'
    3. Observe whether SARAH accepts "DarkSU3" or requires a different casing

If the canonical name differs from "DarkSU3":
    - Amend plugins/hep-ph-toolkit/skills/_shared/sarah_name.py (the provisional canonicalizer)
    - Update plugins/hep-ph-toolkit/SHARED-model-building.md §X with the verified rule
    - Rerun tests/regen_goldens.py
    - Open a one-commit patch touching only sarah_name.py + tests/test_sarah_name.py in _shared

Resolution: Update this file and SHARED.md §X once the probe is complete.
